mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_assessment WHERE system_id = #{systemId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY assessment_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE cs.project_id = #{projectId} AND sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0 ORDER BY sa.total_score DESC, sa.assessment_date DESC
SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.total_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sa.total_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.review_status IN ('pending', 'needs_revision') ORDER BY sa.priority_level DESC, sa.total_score DESC
SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.priority_level DESC, sa.total_score DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE system_assessment SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, review_date = CURDATE(), review_comments = #{reviewComments}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(business_value_score) as avg_business_value, AVG(data_quality_score) as avg_data_quality, AVG(compliance_risk_score) as avg_compliance_risk, AVG(technical_feasibility_score) as avg_technical_feasibility, AVG(total_score) as avg_total_score, COUNT(*) as assessment_count FROM system_assessment WHERE system_id = #{systemId} AND deleted = 0 AND total_score IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_assessments, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'needs_revision' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_revision_count, AVG(total_score) as avg_total_score, AVG(estimated_roi) as avg_estimated_roi, SUM(estimated_benefit) as total_estimated_benefit, SUM(estimated_cost) as total_estimated_cost FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE cs.project_id = #{projectId} AND sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0

SELECT priority_level as level, COUNT(*) as count FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE cs.project_id = #{projectId} AND sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0 AND sa.priority_level IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sa.priority_level ORDER BY CASE sa.priority_level WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 WHEN 'low' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

SELECT CASE WHEN total_score >= 90 THEN '优秀 (90-100)' WHEN total_score >= 80 THEN '良好 (80-89)' WHEN total_score >= 70 THEN '中等 (70-79)' WHEN total_score >= 60 THEN '及格 (60-69)' ELSE '不及格 (0-59)' END as score_range, COUNT(*) as count FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE cs.project_id = #{projectId} AND sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0 AND sa.total_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CASE WHEN total_score >= 90 THEN '优秀 (90-100)' WHEN total_score >= 80 THEN '良好 (80-89)' WHEN total_score >= 70 THEN '中等 (70-79)' WHEN total_score >= 60 THEN '及格 (60-69)' ELSE '不及格 (0-59)' END ORDER BY CASE WHEN total_score >= 90 THEN 1 WHEN total_score >= 80 THEN 2 WHEN total_score >= 70 THEN 3 WHEN total_score >= 60 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

SELECT cs.system_name, sa.estimated_roi, sa.total_score, sa.priority_level FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0 AND sa.estimated_roi IS NOT NULL AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.estimated_roi DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT cs.system_name, sa.estimated_cost, sa.estimated_benefit, sa.estimated_roi FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0 AND sa.estimated_cost IS NOT NULL AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.estimated_cost LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT cs.system_name, sa.estimated_benefit, sa.estimated_cost, sa.estimated_roi FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0 AND sa.estimated_benefit IS NOT NULL AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.estimated_benefit DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.assessment_date < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.assessment_date
SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.assessment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY sa.assessment_date DESC, sa.total_score DESC

SELECT assessor_id, COUNT(*) as assessment_count, AVG(total_score) as avg_score, MIN(assessment_date) as first_assessment, MAX(assessment_date) as last_assessment FROM system_assessment WHERE deleted = 0 AND assessor_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY assessor_id ORDER BY assessment_count DESC

SELECT reviewer_id, COUNT(*) as review_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_count, MIN(review_date) as first_review, MAX(review_date) as last_review FROM system_assessment WHERE deleted = 0 AND reviewer_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY reviewer_id ORDER BY review_count DESC
SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.compliance_risk_score >= #{threshold} AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.compliance_risk_score DESC, sa.total_score DESC
SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.total_score >= #{threshold} AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.total_score DESC, sa.priority_level DESC
SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.recommendation = 'immediate' AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.priority_level DESC, sa.total_score DESC

SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND sa.recommendation IN ('immediate', 'priority') AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY CASE sa.recommendation WHEN 'immediate' THEN 1 WHEN 'priority' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, sa.priority_level DESC, sa.total_score DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE system_assessment SET business_value_score = #{businessValueScore}, data_quality_score = #{dataQualityScore}, compliance_risk_score = #{complianceRiskScore}, technical_feasibility_score = #{technicalFeasibilityScore}, total_score = #{totalScore}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE system_assessment SET estimated_roi = #{estimatedRoi}, estimated_benefit = #{estimatedBenefit}, estimated_cost = #{estimatedCost}, estimated_effort_days = #{estimatedEffortDays}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT sa.* FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0 AND cs.system_type = #{systemType} AND sa.review_status = 'approved' ORDER BY sa.total_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE(sa.assessment_date) as assessment_date, COUNT(*) as assessment_count, AVG(sa.total_score) as avg_score, AVG(sa.estimated_roi) as avg_roi FROM system_assessment sa INNER JOIN customer_system cs ON sa.system_id = cs.id WHERE cs.project_id = #{projectId} AND sa.deleted = 0 AND cs.deleted = 0 AND sa.assessment_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(sa.assessment_date) ORDER BY assessment_date
mapper.update: UPDATE system_assessment SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
